currentLinkedIn.headline: Clinical Informatics Analyst at Mass General Brigham | EHR · FHIR · Patient Safety
currentLinkedIn.about: I sit at the intersection of medicine and technology. Six years translating clinical needs into EHR configurations and data pipelines — always with patient safety as the north star.

experience.title: Clinical Informatics Analyst
bullets: Led Epic build for a 400-bed hospital expansion; coordinated 18 clinical departments through go-live
Designed FHIR-based data pipelines delivering real-time patient data to a sepsis early-warning system
Reduced medication order errors by 22% through targeted CDS alert redesign based on alert-fatigue analysis

experience.title: EHR Implementation Specialist
bullets: Configured PowerChart workflows for 5 community hospital clients across New England
Trained 300+ nurses and physicians on updated documentation workflows during system upgrades
